core_principle.statement: Photography is a documentation of architectural engineering systems, not a lifestyle or decorative visual tool.
core_principle.interpretation: Every image must communicate structure, execution, and system logic.

photography_philosophy.goal: Show how architectural systems are designed, manufactured, and executed in real environments
photography_philosophy.anti_style: Reject lifestyle, luxury, or decorative photography aesthetics

visual_subject_priorities.subject: Installed ceiling systems
visual_subject_priorities.description: Final executed architectural ceiling systems in real buildings
visual_subject_priorities.purpose: Show system outcome and engineering precision

visual_subject_priorities.subject: Installation process
visual_subject_priorities.purpose: Show system reliability and engineering control

visual_subject_priorities.subject: Technical drawings in real context
visual_subject_priorities.description: Blueprints, CAD references, and system documentation

visual_subject_priorities.subject: Manufacturing environment
visual_subject_priorities.description: Factories, production lines, and system fabrication

composition_rules.depth: Shallow decorative depth is forbidden; structural depth is required

subject_behavior_rules.human_elements: Must appear only as functional workers or engineers in context

visual_narrative_logic.sequence: Design → Engineering → Manufacturing → Installation → Finished System
visual_narrative_logic.story_rule: Each image must represent one stage of system transformation
visual_narrative_logic.consistency_rule: All images must feel like parts of a single engineering documentation system

composition_geometry_rules.geometry: Strong linear and modular structure must dominate framing
composition_geometry_rules.repetition: System patterns and modular repetition encouraged

viewer_feeling: This is a real engineering system
This is not decoration, this is infrastructure

strategic_goal.objective: Position AvizSazeh as an engineering execution authority through real-world documentation
strategic_goal.outcome: Visual identity based on truth of execution, not aesthetic simulation
